name: kntnt-skills
description: General-purpose Kntnt skills for Claude Code and Cowork that do not belong to any of the themed Kntnt plugins. Ships agents-md (lean, portable AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md context files), caveman (maximum meaning per token without losing facts), skill-maker (author one skill to the Kntnt standard) and plugin-maker (scaffold a whole standard-compliant plugin, orchestrating skill-maker).
